operation.command: df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print "总空间: "$2, "已用: "$3, "可用: "$4, "使用率: "$5}'; echo "---"; du -sh /* 2>/dev/null | sort -rh | head -10

risk.reason: LLM assessed: The command is a read-only disk usage inspection (df and du), with no modifications or destructive actions.
risk.llm_reason: The command is a read-only disk usage inspection (df and du), with no modifications or destructive actions.
